sources: src/scene/playerCombat.ts: player basic attack → basicProjectileKind / queueProjectile
src/sim/skillEffects.ts: resolveActorSkill → melee, projectile, guard, support branches

src/data/skillFxSheets.ts: dedicated Image2 skill FX sheet registry
